hero.eyebrow: two intro weeks · september 2026 · HvA Amsterdam
hero.subPre: Your first weeks at the HvA. Where your studies begin, and where you
hero.subPost: . Boot in. Fly into the SIT core.

01.desc: Official opening and your first time meeting the board, the committees and your fellow first-years. Exact plan to follow.

02.desc: Get to know the buildings, labs and coffee machines, and above all the people you will get through your year with.

03.desc: The first real SIT drinks. This is where intro groups turn into friend groups, and where your year really starts.

04.desc: Easygoing time to chill, game or just chat. No pressure, no experience needed. Come as you are.

05.scr: something cool is planned, hold tight...

01.desc: Get hands-on with the tech alongside AI4HvA and EduCo: workshops and a CTF taster where you hack your first flag. No prior knowledge needed.

02.desc: A night of LAN, tournaments and couch co-op, hosted by GameIT. Bring your setup or play on ours.

03.desc: Out into Amsterdam with a city game that ends in a bar crawl. For a whole week the city becomes your campus.

04.desc: The big finale of the intro period. Live music, the whole association on one floor and the official start of your year at SIT.

05.scr: a surprise for the real die-hards...

01.title: A crew that sticks
01.body: Your intro group becomes the group you roll through four years of the programme with.

02.title: Free food & drinks
02.body: Lunch, drinks and enough coffee to actually survive your first week.

03.title: Plugged in right away
03.body: Access to {commissies} committees, the Discord and our own SIT server, from day one.

04.title: No experience needed
04.body: Come as you are, coder, gamer, or no clue yet. We sort out the rest.
